review_text: Food was good but very salty

I will start off with our experience in Casa Tequila, As we stepped a foot into this place we felt very unwelcome by the host/servers that were standing in the front reception, Second, as the time we sat in our table our server Oliva’s customer service and attitude was very poor, I will say this, It’s very rude to tell customers “Have you ever had a burrito before” in a sarcastic way when asking what’s in it! The poor attention when needing drinks/refills and messing up our orders was very poor and unhandled. Last, The loud music! Casa Tequila, after reviewing your reviews looks like people complain about the same issue for months, and looks like the issue hasn’t been resolved. This place definitely needs new management and Operating Staff. We really wanted to like this place, but we will say we are very disappointed with our experience!

Very inconsiderate to surrounding residents and businesses. A very loud mariachi band plays every Tuesday night out front making it difficult to sleep or otherwise relax in my apartment. I hope the restaurant sees this review and either moves the band inside or reschedules to a weekend.

Came here for my anniversary dinner and the service was amazing. Attentive waiters and had the pleasure of speaking with the owner as well. They make sure you have what you need and are satisfied with the food and service. Any place that asks whether you’re happy during the meal is definitely a place to go to. Quesabirrias all the way for me and my husband loved the Shrimp Cocktail! Definitely recommend it! Family oriented and owned.
The food was amazing and so was the service! And the watermelon margarita was extremely tasty! I don't understand why they have a 3.8... Definitely deserve a high 4 rating. I will be back!
Great to visit!
Just go to Garcia's on Lawrence & Western for  better and cheaper food and drinks. This place is overpriced & overhyped.

Food was great.  But I did get bamboozled with the weekly drinks sale. They said the sale price was without alcohol but they show mojitos  and other drinks with alcohol so I assumed the piña colada came with alcohol.

Casa Tequila Chicago: A Mixed Plate of Flavors and Service
Casa Tequila in Chicago offers a vibrant atmosphere that initially promises an authentic Mexican dining experience. Stepping inside, the decor is inviting, creating a lively backdrop for a meal with friends or family.
On the culinary front, the restaurant truly shines. The food at Casa Tequila is undeniably good, delivering on flavor and portion size. From classic tacos to more elaborate entrees, each dish we sampled showcased fresh ingredients and satisfying preparation. The guacamole was a particular highlight, fresh and perfectly seasoned, hinting at the quality of the main courses.
However, the experience was tempered by the service, which was merely "okay." While our server was polite, there was a noticeable lack of attentiveness and promptness. Drink refills were slow, and it took a bit longer than ideal to get their attention for requests. It wasn't poor service, but it certainly didn't elevate the dining experience.
The biggest letdown, unfortunately, came from the drinks. Despite the restaurant's name, the margaritas and other cocktails we tried fell short. They lacked the vibrancy and balance one expects from a dedicated tequila establishment, often tasting watered down or overly sweet. This was a significant disappointment, especially given the expectation of quality beverages.
In summary, Casa Tequila is a decent spot for a tasty Mexican meal in Chicago, boasting a good kitchen. While the service is acceptable, and the drinks leave much to be desired, the appealing food does make it worth a visit if you prioritize flavor over a flawless bar experience.
The space itself and staff are pleasant. However, the food just isn't good. It takes like its just out of the can. The burrito and enchilada were indistinguishable.
Food is good, drinks not so much.
This was the most unpleasant experience for me. The tacos had flavor, but was mostly fat meat. I picked enough fat off 2 tacos to make 1. I will not be returning

The food came out really fast and their house margaritas are so bomb (well they better be because it was 20$ for them and it didn't even seem like a lot.) They will definitely get you there. The Atmosphere of the restaurant wasn't what I expected, it had a bad smell but I'm not sure if maybe that was the food someone ordered. I ordered quesabirrias with a side of rice, they were so good but I've had better rice before. It didn't taste like fresh authentic Mexican rice. I also think they are on the pricier side, so if you're on a budget don't go here. There are many other affordable taco spots, its nothing special about this one. Overall, I would go some place else next time for Taco Tuesday.
Very nice place to take your family.  I love the mariachis every Tuesday and also the Carne Azada.
A good place, decent flavor, quality, freshness, and tranquility. The only downside is the long parking situation; it's better to take an Uber.
Food Excellent, Service Excellent. We came 3 days straight. Requested the same waiter & we loved it!!

This restaurant has a lot going for it – the place was awesome, and the food was genuinely delicious. However, I was somewhat put off by their automatic 18% gratuity for just two people. While I understand automatic gratuity for larger groups, imposing it on a small party removes the incentive for exceptional service and the diner's ability to reward accordingly. The food was great, but this policy left a slightly sour taste.
Had an awesome dining experience here. Love the food. My hubby was craving 🥩

After living on Division for over four years, my fiancé and I finally decided to give Casa Tequila a try — and regretted it almost immediately. From the moment we were seated, things went downhill. We were served stale chips with salsa that tasted like it came from a can — and not even a good one. I’ve had better salsa straight out of a grocery store jar.

My fiancé ordered a skinny margarita that somehow cost $20. Twenty dollars — for a basic drink. We ordered the standard fish tacos (bland), another kind of fish taco (also forgettable), and the quesabirria tacos (just okay). And for over $20 for three underwhelming tacos? Insane.

To try to justify the price, they serve the tacos on a ridiculously oversized 12-by-8-inch wooden plank that makes no sense. It looks more like a novelty cutting board than a plate. It’s clearly meant to create a false sense of presentation value, but when the tacos don’t even come with rice or beans, it just ends up being a giant slab of wood taking up 10% of your table for no reason.

Service didn’t help the experience. When I asked for the check, the server didn’t print one — instead, he brought over a handheld scanner and awkwardly held it up with pre-set tip options. I always tip 20%, and I did — but I’ve never felt more ripped off walking out of a restaurant.

This place clearly leans heavily on branding and aesthetics, because the food and value just aren’t there. I’ll be shocked if this establishment manages to stay open for another two years. There’s no way anyone who actually lives on this street would ever come back — especially not for overpriced takeout.

If you’re craving steak and a proper cocktail, go to Gibsons — you’ll spend less and enjoy it more. And if you’re in the mood for Mexican, just about any other spot within five miles will offer better food, better pricing, and a more authentic experience — without the gimmicks.
Nice place to eat
C eat great place

Worst experience I have had thus far called in to book my reservation a week in advance and they failed to add it to books basically said oh well it’ll be an hour and a half wait. Only thing they had to say was there is nothing we can do just pathetic Didn’t try to accommodate me for their mess up. Messed up my birthday dinner!!!!!

Uriel, one of the owners, spent time with us describing the process of how tequila arrives at our doorsteps. Chris, was also very attentive and made sure we were taken care of our entire stay. I will not being going back to this restaurant ever again. There was a previous time that I had dinner here and the food was served cold.

This place is overprice and overhyped for what it actually is. Food wasn't all that- their "specialty" steaks not really what you'd expect. I did leave the mashed potatoes because they were liquidy with veggies on top. Just not great. Drinks tbh I've had better and they are on the pricier side too.

Service our waiter in the beginning wasn't great but he actually turned it around and made it better by being friendly and talkative - so no problem there. They do take long on making drinks. Idk if they add alcohol or not on the margaritas but it was all sweetness. The busboys though man they need manners. They don't say excuse me when they drop the chips and salsa or when they pick up. They take everything and don't ask if we were done. That made me eh because we could still have been working on it and TIP (18%) is already included which I don't think is fair for 2 ppl.

Honestly- it could have been better.

I went twice in eight days because the food was so good! The first time was on a Saturday evening and the place was packed, low lights and great music. I was happy they had one open table left as I walked in. I had the grilled chicken salad and added steak. It was so flavorful and grilled to perfection. Then I came back on Sunday afternoon and the vibe was more chill. I’m sure it had plenty to do with the rain. I had two chicken tacos and a beef taco. The chicken was my favorite. I tried my friend’s bean enchilada and ended up eating it all. Topped it all off with a red sangria! Needless to say I’ve made reservations to go back! Lbs! My server Kevin was the best!
This was my 1st time here and it was good. Not busy and that passionfruit margarita was FYE… me n my crew each had a meal and drink!

Food was under cooked. Servers were not very helpful. As I was paying I’m writing in the tip when I noticed a “ larger Party percent “ on the check. What constitutes a large party?? It was just me and my wife. Either way that “ larger party percent “ was 40 dollars. Definitely not going back.

Watch out for server OLIVIA. She likes to charge “large party fees” to small parties, after giving terrible service and being incredibly rude. She purposefully altered our receipt and tried to cross out the fee with sharpie. Super unprofessional and weird.
the server OLIVIA charged us for a large party fee and tried to get a tip out of us when there was only 4 of us. the server was rude and i hope she gets in trouble for everything she has done.

He was rude didn’t even speak back to me. Raised the window for me to leave out and basically rushing me to finish my drink. I think it was because I was a black woman in his establishment. He treated the white woman that was next to me way different. I will never come here again do not recommend. They do not like black people. Only want your money.

We weren’t aware of it being a automatic tip and not only that everything was charged individually when on the menu it doesn’t say that…it’s extra for cheese extra for beans it didn’t say that on the menu, on the menu it’s all together as one price and staff was very impatient as we were ordering as if he didn’t want us asking how anything was made

They don't tell you how long the wait might be for reservations. We ordered a Margarita and it was poured way below the rim of the glass. They said they were out of regular-sized glasses (the menu doesn't specify the size or that there's more than one glass option). If they don't have the right glass, they should fill the one they have or wash one of the correct size. We ordered queso fundido with chorizo ​​and the cheese looked like melted plastic. We asked for another tortilla and the waiter told us that if we wanted an order, he'd have to charge us an extra $4. Seriously, they're not willing to give us a free tortilla when we waited at least 30 minutes for a table, and then there was the glass incident???

Disappointing experience. I'm Mexican, and the taste and service are nowhere near what we offer in Mexico.

Today I went to Casa Tequila for the first time and the atmosphere and food were very good, but what really made it special was the excellent service we received from Christopher. He made us feel at home; he was very kind, cheerful, and professional. Thank you.

My darlings, listen to me please and thank you okay, this spot came highly recommended, and the moment I walked in, the smell hit my stomach like, *oh yes, we’re about to do some serious damage.* I could barely contain my excitement I was ready to eat!

First up, a spicy margarita. And let me tell you, hands down, one of the best I’ve ever had absolutely delicious. Then came the chips, warm just how I like them, with salsa that had the perfect kick. So far, so fabulous.
Then came my chicken chimichanga… or so I thought. One sniff and hold on why does my chicken smell like beef? *Absolutely no not nope,* darlings, I don’t eat that. The staff, ever so lovely, sorted it straight away and brought me a fresh dish. Unfortunately, taste wise, it just didn’t do it for me. Tried something new, didn’t work out happens to the best of us.
However, the chicken wraps whatever that dish was (third pic) had great flavour and were definitely a win! Now those were full of flavour absolutely spot on. Juicy, well-seasoned, and downright delicious
That said, I’d still recommend this place purely for the margaritas and salsa worth every sip and bite. Next time, I’ll give the tacos a go. Oh, and a little heads-up they don’t do separate checks, so plan accordingly. But the staff? Sweet as pie.
Beyond amazing service & atmosphere!! The Food?? Undeniably delicious and Lucio was the perfect host! Highly Highly Recommend for any occasion
Excellent Service

Sub par Mexican food. All of the dishes lack seasoning. Meat is very bland. Ordered Margaritas.  They were nothing to remember. They were more of a sugary puree of fruit.
Parking can be difficult in the area. Residential permits are required on most  blocks or you can utilize paid metered street parking if you're lucky.
Nice service, great atmosphere for hanging out but it didn't meet my expectations or satisfy my taste buds. I would not return and can appreciate authentic Mexican food.  I suggest if you are looking for flavorful Mexican dishes seek another restaurant.

When we arrived there was no recognition of the birthday. The food was alright had the carne asada and there was not taste besides a big taste of just straight char. Kind of disappointed.

We visited during the weekend. It was our second time visiting The fajitas were delicious but the quesabirrias were just dry. And the drinks were awful. I asked for a margarita and it was so salty in top of that our waiter added the 20% gratuity when it was just me and my husband our bill came out to $250. Will not be visiting again.

The food was good, so no doubts in that department.

The waiters were VERY nice and VERY friendly, but lord, the wait times to be attended were TOO LONG. It took half an hour for us to even ask for a drink, and took them like an hour to come around and take our orders.

I went Friday night an  hr before closing, we asking if the kitchen still open they said yes, The waiter Lucio, arrived at our table with a terrible attitude. He could have placed our drink order without even greeting us or giving us a smile. We greeted him and he never responded to our greeting. We ordered a wine and our food. We asked for mixed tortillas and he never told us that it was an extra charge. We also work in the restaurant industry and we understand that it was his last table, but we also understand that service and kindness come first. We gave him a very small tip because the truth is that he didn't deserve it! In the end he didn't even give us a thank you! Friend, if you don't like your job, maybe you're in the wrong place.

Food was okay. Drinks were weak. And server did some shady shit with the bill. He scratched the QR code out and the large party gratuity fee. Which was just me and my gf. I tip pretty gratefully but when a restaurant does shady shit like that. Never coming back.

Due to work schedules my girlfriend and I spent Christmas Eve at home and decided to order from this place … 100 dollars for 2 people I would expect my food with better presentation and much better tasting. My rice was covered in some red sauce as well as my beans. My chicken was tougher than leather and it was NOT GRILLED. My guacamole had huge chunks of onions and jalapeño and a huge piece of cucumber in the middle… I would have been happier with chipotle .

Celebrated my boyfriend birthday here along with his family. The seating we got was probably the worst table available, we were right outside of the Kitchen, very tight seating & very loud. The service was fantastic, everyone was very kind & welcoming. The food was not as great as we had heard it was but it was still enjoyable, but the quality definitely did not match their insane prices. The drinks were really good & strong enough to have the birthday girl on the table next to is fall all over the place (lol) Overall, I would probably go again but not to indulge in expensive dishes because I don’t think they were that great for the fees.

I called in an order. They told me it would take 10 minutes. I got there in 20 minutes and my burrito was NOT DONE.  They told me that I needed to wait for them to finish cooking it. What was the point of calling in if you don’t cook orders in advance!? On top of that, they charged me MORE for my order than what was on all of their menus and their online menu. The guy there said their prices changed and he would not honor the price on the website or in the menus sitting on their counters. They also messed up my very simple order— a steak burrito. They gave me chicken. The cheese sauce is really good, but that’s not enough to make me appreciate the poor service here. Not going to return.

Went yesterday and horrible experience,food was good don’t get me wrong but they literally gave me 4 piece of meat for 30 dollars in the molcajete. When it was time for the bill they added a 20 dollar tax and then tipped themselves 40 dollars for service which was a whole 60 dollars added. That could’ve have been 2 more meals. When asked why they said “oh people walk out the door without tipping” that sounded like a personal issue. I had brought along cash to tip but once seeing them tip themselves it was over. My older brother told him what if the service was wack, you can’t give yourself money when did this start because I was here last month. The man said they just started it 3 weeks ago🤦🏾‍♀️. As we finally just settled it and paid and was walking out, the man said to my brother “oh I’ll go sell drugs too” my brother don’t even sell drugs. And he stereotyped the hell out of him. Never again.

I will never visit this establishment ever again, me and my girlfriend just left this restaurant. The dinner we just ate was very mediocre! And the staff were constantly staring at us and pointing to our table multiple times. The kicker was while we were dining in, our waiter he forgot our silverware, and waited five minutes to even acknowledge us as we were trying to gain his attention. As we were finishing up our food, He presented the bill and then when he brought us our change back, he then went and said just a fyi the gratuity isn’t included, as if I couldn’t comprehend my bill and not see that it wasn’t. He literally engaged with other tables doing things such as refilling their waters and constantly asking them if they were ok. Not to mention the tables he was being more proactive to were tables of Mexican families, and me and my girlfriend are black, I never wanted to make this about race but there was a big significant difference and how he treated their tables from ours. We will never ever eat here again.

10/10 the food spectacular, the owner came to personally ask how we felt and that man cared about customer satisfaction. Definitely recommend. Tomahawk 10/10 and drinks were loaded.

I am writing to express my extreme disappointment with my recent dining experience at your restaurant. Unfortunately, our visit fell far short of expectations due to multiple issues: The steak we ordered was not cooked to our specifications. Despite requesting medium well, what we received was significantly undercooked. We were served the wrong wine, which was not what we had ordered. There was no manager on duty to address our concerns or rectify the situation. Despite these issues, we empathize with our server, who appeared overwhelmed and was doing their best under the circumstances.Additionally, our order was incomplete as we did not receive our fries and asparagus. This experience was truly disappointing and does not reflect the level of service and quality one expects from casa tequila As a frequent diner, I have always valued the dining experience here, but this visit has left us reconsidering future visits.
I would appreciate a response regarding this matter and hope that steps will be taken to prevent such issues in the future.

I had friends visiting from out of town. The owner and staff were very kind, attentive and friendly. Made us feel welcome.  We ordered several dishes but my favorite was the Carne Asada, Steak quesadillas and the Quesabirrias. The food was high quality. Margaritas were excellent, and the food presentation was top notch. I didn’t get a chance to take pictures of the food cause we digged into the food as soon as it touched the table. I highly recommend Casa Tequila.
Great service! Great food everything was perfect! Thank you! Kevin was wonderful! Totally recommend him as your server beautiful place outside dining
Delicious 😋
food was good, the services  were good and  give you plenty of meat 🍖 😉

This place is amazing!!! We had a great time Monday afternoon, I highly recommend Los camarones a la diabla. We truly had an amazing time, the service was 10/10 as well as the food. Come check them out.
Loved our waiter CHRIS!!! He was attentive and so sweet! 10/10 across the board!

The entire experience was amazing! Our waiter, Chris was the absolute best! Immaculate service, food was great and the margaritas were delicious. My new favorite restaurant and I’m thankful for the divine hospitality and service.

The place is spectacular, the quality of the food and the meat is incredible, you can feel how fresh it is, the piña colada is divine, the atmosphere and the staff are very attentive, especially Chris, a super nice and very cheerful waiter. I loved it and highly recommend it.
I loved Chris as my server! He gave the best service and made my experience there a 10 out of 10! Highly recommend
Love the food drinks and atmosphere! The service is always great! The house margarita is fire and nothing on the menu will disappoint.

I love this place. The vibe is amazing. The staff is really attentive and especially Chris, he is the most attentive with his tables. Making his rounds asking us if we need anything, I recommend this place to anyone. Amazing food & drinks !

I recently went to celebrate my birthday, and everything was absolutely perfect! Our server, Christopher, was amazing ,he made sure everything went smoothly and took such great care of us the whole time. He’s so nice and attentive, and truly made the night extra special. I’ll definitely be asking for him again next time. Highly recommend Christopher!
The staff was attentive and friendly.
Thank you Kevin and casa tequila for giving me a great experience n birthday event
Amazing Food & Excellent Service. Will definitely recommend 💯❤️🙏
Great size of food
Had a reservation, ended up a busy night so didn't get seated until about 30mins after reservation.  Food was fantastic 😋. Drinks we're good, large selection.
Chris is an amazing server! Very friendly and polite. Highly recommend!
Chris was the best!

The experience is great.It's actually my 3rd time here me and my family, great vibes, cleanliness,food is delicious and the caso is the best and drinks are definitely worth every penny. Thanks to the bartender Tony for our good drinks .

We love the drinks here, super delicious. And we loved our service!!
Johanna's service was excellent because she explained everything to us in English and Spanish, which is important for the service.
Johanna was our server, amazing service. Great food!
Johanna was our server very nice lady.
I enjoyed this place I come here a lot food is very good especially the steak season very good , Tony the bartender was great as usual love his drinks and hospitality great person .
Food is seasoned to perfection and service is  exceptional: our server was Tony!

Love the vibe here!! Amazinggg drinks with such a wide selection. Their food is also solid. Then you add to that with great vibes... and that’s what’s draws a great crowd. On top of that, our servers were wonderful- Tony and Lucio. Hope to get them next time. Oh, and they also have daily deals ;)
Such a great Mexican restaurant. Exactly what you are looking for. Food with a real identity, drinks you expect. If you want Mexican, can’t miss here

I came on a Friday night to enjoy some drinks alone my waiter was Chris he made me laugh and treated me wonderfully I would definitely come back one of the nights out , great music , great service and fast service .
Excellent service, I loved the food, especially Cris, our waiter, who has a friendly personality and is very attentive. The food was delicious, I definitely recommend going back. 🤍

Nice and clean restaurant I like the atmosphere. The outside dine is perfect for nice Chicago weather Margarita and the food was delicious I had three tacos however I was more a fan of the Guacamole. And to top my Experience off our Waiter Chris Was amazing… I will be returning soon and high Recommend

Dining in here was amazing my husband and I enjoyed the food, our waitress mrs. Nany T. She is wonderful everything about her is so amazing the service the food the drinks we will definitely be back.. K.C
Olivia was great! 😊
Waitress Nany served me very well. The food was very good and the drinks too; the atmosphere was fantastic.

This place was great. Been here twice already and def a place to visit. Drinks are amazing...not weak at all. Food portions are very big. On the pricey side but worth it. Nice set up inside and out. You can dine in n outside. Nany was our waitress and she was great and attentive. They have a happy hour too...M-Th 4pm to 6pm. Def worth it.
My Server Nany T was Amazing. The atmosphere  & the Food was Excellent on point. This is my second time dining there! We will be back 🫶🏿 And Great location
Highly recommend food and drinks are 10/10, The Bartender Lucio is so nice and definitely sets the vibe!! Espresso martinis & shots he made so bomb!
Food was excellent and Lucio is one of the best bartenders. Hope yall are lucky enough to have him as your bartender (:
Excellent service! Olivia was very kind and attentive to everything and took great care of us. The food was delicious, highly recommended. The mariachis sang beautifully.
Wonderful service, food and drinks. Chris was the the best server I’ve had in a long time 😊 If you are in the area make sure you come see Chris 🤏🏽🤏🏽definitely will be back soon‼️‼️

Super nice restaurant everyone (staff) nice and friendly clean and the food came out super fresh and fast.My waiter name is Chris and he is so wonderful!!!!! I love it here already for a first time experience and I definitely will be back and spread the word….Super satisfied and I would love for Chris to be my server everytime!! Keep up the great job 👏🏾 😉☺️☺️☺️
The food is very good, especially the Will Burgers 🍔 …
food was good, waiters were polite and chill and very friendly
Food was fyeee, Chris is a great guy and great energy
Excellent service. I ordered a chicken salad which was really delicious, and the Margaritas, which are special on Mondays, by the way. A very pleasant experience indeed. 100% recommended.

Everything was delicious. The staff was very friendly. Tony, the bartender, gave us many margarita flavor options... I highly recommend it, especially the salmon salad, which was very tasty. I come to this place whenever I can. Thank you, #THANKYOU #HOUSE #TEQUILA

Came in on a Monday food is not authentic  Mexican. Tacos are ground beef or chicken  options. Sea food is mostly  shrimp. Drink are very heavy alcohol poured. The mac looks like Kraft box. Quesabirria consume was oddly  sweet. The burrito  is covered on in a white salty sauce.
Grace was great ! Great service
Super nice server named grace.
Grace was a lovely host who attended to our needs. The food was seasoned to perfection.
Food was good and seasoned. Service was nice, Grace was our server she was attentive and polite. Had a nice time.
Food was alright. But the waitress was excellent, if I do say so myself. She was very attentive 💜

Great happy hour.
4$  Blue moon.
$2.99 huge chicken taco
$9 guacamole.
$10 melted  cheese with  choruzo.
Came here for a friends birthday. The place, food, drinks, and service were phenomenal.  Definitely, I will come back here again.

Great service, Great food, great atmosphere!
When you go ask for Chris
Great atmosphere and very helpful staff. Lucio was very helpful. I’ll be back for sure.
Just do it, Lucio is the best!
Great service and food
Margaritas were amazing Lucio is the best server thank you soo much great first experience
Awesome place, Christopher is an awesome server. I would recommend coming and eating here!😎 …
Great food and wonderful service by a server by the name of Chris

I had a great experience here. I came and sat at the bar. The bartender was very welcoming and helpful with me choosing the best drink.I believe this name was Tony. I also got the birria tacos they were sooooo good. I highly recommend this place.

I wanna start off by saying the server Tony was great. He was very attentive & explained the menu/deals very well. On top of that the portions were fulfilling along with the drinks. I’d recommend this restaurant & if you come ask for Tony. I’ll definitely be back.
Tony you were amazing! Thank you for a great night!
Kevin has great customer service food was delicious 😋 10/10

My first experience here was AMAZING! Which made me return tonight. HORRIBLE experience. To start we had a party of 4, was given silverware for 2. Had to ask multiple times which I didn't pay any attention to. We did a toast and the glass broke. We politely asked for assistance to clean up the glass and spill and was told one moment.  They literally was sweeping the floor, ignored us and kept sweeping while we was just standing there looking crazy! I just asked for the check ask for boxes and didn't want to give us boxes. My sister yes was heated and spazzed out but the level of disrespect was not caused for at all. We will NEVER return here EVER!!! $300 we spent here to be treated unprofessional as if we didn't matter. So guess what our money will didn't note support this place ever again. Food done fell off. Chicken dry, steak gummy and service is SHITTY!!
Probably the best birria taco I've had from a restaurant. Also you have to try the grilled pineapple margarita. If you get it frozen have them add pineapple juice to it. (Recommend by the bartender)

Went there for sweetest made reservations but I guess that didn't matter because she didn't ask if we had it or not nor did she greet us we stood there for at least a min or 2 and when she did recognize us it was to sit us down still no greet the food was good tho but I'm not going back out waitress was not best she wasn't bad either she just gave imma get a tip anyway our bill was $174 and she got a $25 tip

10 out of 10 experience 😍 our serve, Kevin was great and attentive, even though he had a lot of parties. It was perfect. The food was so seasoned. My man got the ribeye you cooked  medium I will say that it was kind of too chaaard on the bottom like some pieces were well done and some pieces were medium well and medium throughout the steak so I would just say they could cook the medium steaks better in the future still very flavorful , I got some chicken and Shrimp dish. The rice was so seasoned. The drinks were so strong the passionfruit margarita was nice also ordered a side car with some bourbon they made that so well I had such a great time and it's so cute

Amazing experience! Tony was the best… so friendly and attentive. We came in after running the Chicago Marathon, and he even comped us queso to celebrate! The service was outstanding, and the food was so good. Fresh, authentic, and full of flavor. You can tell they really care about their customers. Highly recommend for both the food and the incredible service!
Tony was great! We loved him, he really checked in on us and made the experience wonderful.
We had the pleasure of eating here and getting Tony as a waiter. He was fantastic and the food was delicious. Highly recommend this incredible spot!!

Casa Tequila in Chicago is such a gem! The food was absolutely delicious—fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. The tacos and mocktail were the stars of the night, but honestly, everything we tried was amazing. The atmosphere was warm and the staff made us feel right at home with their friendly and attentive service. Perfect spot for a casual night out or a fun celebration. Definitely coming back!
Tony the bartender was great he checked on us and made sure we was good and have great customer service skills I will be back
Tony the Bartender was amazing. My food came in a timely manner, and was delicious. I’ll be back soon.
Tony the Bartender was amazing and very helpful during our time here. The food and drinks was worth it and I will recommend it to anyone looking for a new taco spot. Will be back!
Good food ! The enchiladas were really good .
The food was amazing and Tony was a great server and bartender. I will be back!
The food was delicious the service with grace was amazing she was respectful
Grace was great
Margarita Monday is unmatched. Lucio is the best 👌🏼 …
Best food ever!

My first visit and first time having Quesabirria. Almost the entire experience was delightful!! The food was delicious, and the service was top notch. Kevin V. is very polite and attentive. Not overbearing. The only part I didnt like was that they didn't allow separate checks. Otherwise, it's on my list of favorite places.
Bad experience.

In the ever growing trend of non Mexicans operating "taco/Mexican" restaurants in and around Wicker Park, it's great to have this actually Mexican restaurant.

The staff is nice and attentive, too.

Anyone who complains can go to the bland, boring taco wannabe restaurants nearby.
Kevin was amazing! Would recommend’

I wanted to give it a four cause the food was good not great but good. Ordered a molcajete and usually other restaurants packed the molcaje but this one was just on piece of meat, one piece of chicken & had more queso fresco than protein & the lettuce was under the molcajete which is super hot so idk why it was under it, It wasn’t packed enough for the price they charged us and the enchiladas were kinda sweet, I was expecting spicy-ness since it’s “Mexican restaurant” the drinks which were strawberry lemonade & regular lemonade & an alcohol drink were great doe

But despite that I liked it and might come back to try other plates. I won’t judge from the first visit. Let’s hope it’s better the second visit.
I had an amazing experience when I went 2 weeks ago. The food was RIDICULOUSLY good, flavored and tender, good portions and the service was amazing
The Blue Passion Margarita was wonderful! The food was excellent!
It was great
The Food and services was ok. I was over charged verses what my card was swiped for and the tip I left.  I I’ll never return.People pay attention to your receipts.
The food is amazing and Grace was so nice. Customer service is over the top!
Grace have great customer service .
Everything was delicious, the service was very pleasant, and the drinks that Mr. Tony makes are excellent ♥️

Overall Casa Tequila is a very nice place to dine. I had one of the best steaks I ever had in my life. Astetically, the decor is warm and vibrant and gives a welcoming feeling. With that said, we waiting 7 minutes at the door with out any greeting from the hostess or staff. They were probably at 50% capacity at this time. We had to get the bartenders attention and they were so nonchalant and told us to wait for the hostess. Hostess came, no greeting just took us to a table. But our waiter was on top of everything! Tip is built into you bill even for a table of 4.
Chris was AMAZING. best customer service I have ever experience. I definitely recommend.
Johanny was a great waitress. We enjoyed our food- everything was very flavorful. Great customer service.
Thanks to Chris, me and my Aunt enjoyed ourselves yesterday. Food was good and the birthday shout out was amazing.
Drinks were fire! Grace was perfect! 10/10
This is my favorite Mexican spot in the city! It’s rare to find a spot with good food and drinks but this restaurant does both well. Everyone I bring here raves about it and become regulars.
Food was delicious, and waitresses were super nice. Shout out to Grace for the amazing service.
Waiter had impeccable service , food was great .
We had a great experience at the restaurant the ambiance was great we also had a waiter his name was Tony and he was great! He had great hospitality and the food was phenomenal!
THE FOOD WWS ABSOLUTELY GREAT OMG TONY WAS GREAT ,GREAT ATMOSPHERE ,GREAT DRINKS FOOD WAS SO FLAVORFUL OMG PLEASEEEEE MAKE THIS UR NEXT STOP TO CASA TEQUILA 🥰🥰🥰🥰
Wow, my food was excellent. I will definitely return to this place.

The atmosphere seemed very good for a celebration when we were initially booking but the food was disappointing.
The food was over cooked and overly salty and the desserts were clearly pre-bought and not very good
Grace is amazing. She attended to us and our every need while we were here. I would definitely recommend Casa Tequila to all my family and friends because of Grace and the food
Grace was an amazing server, very attentive! I received my food fast
Grace was very helpful and patient. It was our first time at the restaurant and made us feel so welcomed.
Grace was great, very attentive!
Awesome!

Grace did what needed to be done
Love the environment and the hospitality
Will be back for sure
Very welcoming experience with our server Grace! 10/10 welcoming attitude and atmosphere
Grace was wonderful!
Great food. Great atmosphere. Delicious. Will come back again!
Love love this place **hearts**

Loved it here — I’ll definitely be back. Grace, our waitress, was wonderful. My only critique is that the margaritas could be better, but everything else was great. The mashed potatoes were honestly the best I’ve ever had anywhere.
Very kind very great service!!
Grace services was 10/10 come check her out 🫶🏼
First time here Dinner ordered Fajitas I thought I made a mistake by ordering since all I got was unions and pepper  2 or 3 pice s of meat   Over price.
Great food great Service,  Fernanda was a fantastic host.
Food! Was! Delish! Service! Was! Great!

This place is super cool and chill. We stopped for drinks before the Bulls game tonight. Tony was are bartender and he is an absolute rock star. His drinks were made perfectly and his suggestion on a sipping tequila blew my mind. We did have chips and salsa. Chips were served warm which I absolutely appreciate. Salsa was ok. Coming back for steak, Tony’s suggestion.
Everything about this place is great!
Service was wonderful and so was the food I'll be returning for sure
The food was delicious, fresh, hot and seasoned very well. There wasn't a long wait between ordering and receiving the food. The waiter Chris was very attentive and friendly.
Very good and tasty food! The manager was amazing and very attentive! Definitely will come back

Tik tok may have or may not have been a slight factor of coming here.. But highly disappointed.... from the start I felt judged and rushed to order. I wanted the tomahawk which I thought was popular but they didnt even have the $110 steak. Service definitely could have been better than I was given...

food was good service wasn’t great we sat there wayy over an hour for our food and the service didn’t check on us for refills or anything and they don’t ever answer the phone like ever now i get the gratuity but that much for poor service and food is crazy and i always tip no matter what! we asked if we could split the checks and she said no to us then when we paid she had said the we could.
The food quality is that of a hole-in-the-wall tex-mex place, but the cost of a Fulton Market luxury dining.  Makes no sense why its so expensive.
It was Very pleasant

Me and My Family love this place, it's really our favorite restaurant. The service is Amazing, the Frozen Margaritas were My favorite when I did drink Liquor. The Carne Asada Meal is THE BEST, Barria Tacos are very Good, the Chips are always fresh and the salsa is very good. Service has never been a issue for us. Would Highly Recommend!

Horrible I called around 3 they said they don’t take reservations. Walked in at 7 they said they stopped taking walk ins I walked out but I seen another couple right behind me saying they didn’t have reservations yet they were seated. I walked backed in and ask the girl in the front about walk ins she said they stop at 6:30 but she will put me on the waiting list. 7:30 I get a call I called back at 7:33 and Tino or what ever the guys name was in the front stated they called me a while ago! Which was a lie so horrible service stop hiring young people working the front on busy days like this! First time going and last time! Sorry Chris dolo

Was planning a visit and came across this place on a reel. The food and drinks lived up to the expectations. Everything came out hot and fairly quick. Drinks were good but heavy handed, so be cautious. They brought out lettuce and sour cream when i requested it be left off but this was fixed immediately.

Greeting was warm.
Atmosphere is nice.
Waitress not a people person. Customer service skills were unpleasant.
Food ok. Disappointed because I paid $100 plus this place automatically add the tip into your bill. No questions asked. All of this for birria steak tacos, enchiladas and $14 Pina Colada. The rice was oily and salty. The salsa and chips were the best thing I ate.

If you want the experience, I would recommend you try this place out. If you want flavorable food, I suggest finding a different place.

Unfortunately, looks can sometimes be deceiving.

Their quesabirrias tacos were 🔥😋
and their frozen margaritas were good too. Very friendly service.  I can't wait to go back.

Love this place food is good people are nice and friendly but drinks are from 0 to 10 a 41/2 come on this is the casa of tequila i order few margaritas and no, nothing to taste at all please ill give it one more chance make sure is got tequila on it🤗

Last night I stopped by this place for a drink while I was waiting for some friends, so I sat at the bar. That was a mistake, I can tell you. The bartender really took his time, both to serve me and to bring my drink. They should hire more dynamic staff to provide better service.

Food is almost inedible. Cheapest imaginable chips and salsa to start, very bad house margarita and main dish flat out terrible. Hostess was very unwelcoming, but very friendly waiter. Food quality has to improve if the restaurant wants to survive with the prices they charge. There are too many better options around
I'm definitely glad that we picked to go during the week. Posed to the weekend service was great. Food was great atmosphere was amazing.
Myself and my girlfriend went and the place was nice and the food was good. Pricey, but not too bad.

I went for a colleague's birthday; apparently, she gave me a cocktail she had ordered, but I didn't like it. However, the garlic shrimp weren't bad, but we had to ask three times for the birthday girl's complimentary drink, and then they came over to sing and give her a shot.

My experience wasn't the best. The girl who served me at the bar was very friendly, but there was a moment when I asked the manager something and he answered very rudely and it was clear he wasn't in the mood, and he left me hanging. I felt super uncomfortable. Maybe I was just having a bad day. 👍
Awsome
Food and customer service was amazing!
yall played g, it looked good BUT my food was cold and unseasoned
The food was amazing! The vibes were great! I will definitely be back soon. Thanks to Tony!
Amazing restaurant! Food 10/10. Tony behind the bar is GREAT!

This is my favorite Mexican restaurant by a landslide. Tony and Uriel are the kindest and always make sure you feel right at home during your dining experience.
I always get a tortilla soup, queso dip, shredded chicken quesadilla , quesa-birra tacos and it’s phenomenal everytime. I always bring my friends and family here and every meal is so authentic and tasty.
I absolutely love this place, the service is always great, atmosphere and food is amazing!!

Our service was great! However, the host at the time (Jaime) was rude to one of the servers and that gave me a very bad impression. The server was trying to explain him something and he cut her off very rudely. That gave me a very awful environment

Ate there a few weeks ago and it was amazing! The staff were so nice and welcoming. Our server Carlos was awesome and very efficient in making sure we had everything we needed and made our time there very enjoyable. Ask for Carlos when you go! 10/10

I recently visited Casa Tequila and it quickly became one of my favorite Mexican spots! From the moment you walk in, the vibrant atmosphere, colorful decor, and welcoming staff make you feel right at home.

Shout out to Jaime for making our visit memorable. Will definitely stop by again!
Our server Jaime was super attentive and spot on. Was very detailed when we had question about the menu.
Jamie was the best server. He was so kind and attentive. This place was vibey and cute!
Jaime was supper attentive! Thanks for the great service!
First time visiting not what I expected. This place is amazing food and the service is great. Worth a visit. This place did NOT disappoint.

Discovered this place back in 2021 and since then have traveled from Peoria to Chicago for their authentic Mexican food and outstanding service. TONY bartender and connoisseur of craft cocktails, Tequila & Mezcal, amazing conversationalist and true passion for his craft!! Now CELE bartender and waiter, enthusiastic personality and always hits the mark with his food recommendations paired with the perfect cocktail! Olivia, charming waiter with great recommendations for Latin Nightlife. The crown jewel OWNER URIEL, magnificent host!! Always makes us feel welcomed, immense gratitude that in turn makes us feel appreciated.

We both love and always on the hunt for authentic Mexican restaurants that check all our boxes. This place is a must and never disappoints. Well worth our drive and time spent there.

Our perspective comes from a Mexican cultural ethnicity along with modern and a true admiration for those business whom exude authenticity, hard work and quality over quantity.

***We were too immersed in our experience we completely forgot to take pictures ***
Thank you Carlos!
The food is amazing and the service is impeccable. A perfect place to dine in the heart of the city with authentic Mexican cuisine.

This was our first time in Chicago fans we are here for 3 days. We didn’t know where to eat we tried a decent place for lunch but for dinner we decided to come try Casa Tequila. I can honestly say we hit the jackpot. The atmosphere food and service are excellent. We were lucky enough that the bartender Tony was also our server. He treated us great !!!!! He took the time to explain the menu and all the specials. But what I enjoyed the most was that he introduced me to a whole new cocktail experience. We are going to be back tomorrow and the next day. Highly recommended this place you won’t be disappointed.

First time at Casa Tequila. Quality service, great atmosphere. Sat at the bar. Tony was fantastic. Very knowledgeable on tequilas. Multiple birthday celebrations going on. House Margarita on the rocks with Tajin is a must. Big serving of queso fundido was tasty. Many specials weekly at this spot including a live mariachi band. Solid spot will be back.
tony is the best bartender and has the best tequila suggestions! such good queso fundido. we are local and will definitely be back.

This was our first time at this restaurant and the vibe was amazing The server Carlos was amazing  our first time here was 10/10 food hot and delicious thanks Carlos for making this experience a special experience
5 stars always
Mario one of the best servers enjoyed my experience and service great steak by the way
Sofia  the BEST
Sofia was delightful, very attendant and polite!!! Definitely will be returning soon!
Very over priced and sub par...
Cele and Tony are absolutely amazing every time! They make you feel so welcome and take good care of you at Casa Tequila! Regular spot for us.
Great service very attentive.! Our waiter Lucio C was great. Food was 10/10 will definitely be back GIRLS NIGHT was a success.! Definitely reserve your table we had no wait what so ever.!

The service and food was great. Lucio was very attentive and great. The food was also good. We made reservations at 8 and got here on time and were seated right away. I would recommend coming here the vibes were good :)
The service and food was great here. Our waiter Lucio was excellent. Definitely recommend and coming back for sure! Our girls night was successful!
Great service from Lucio! Food was amazing! Successful girls night out.!
Kevin was a fantastic server.  He was very prompt and took great care of us.  Food was fantastic and huge servings.  So glad we found this gem on Google.  It was worth leaving downtown for!
Lucio was amazing , he deserves a raise he never fails me 🙏🏾💪🏾
Outstanding service and good vibes!!!!!
If you're looking for a good lunch spot or quick cocktail/apps this is the place!! Their queso dip is 10/10!!
The service is amazing and the food is so much more than that. This is a must eat  Lucio is amazing so on top of everything

We went for my aunts birthdays w a party of 13, the server was pretty nice until we got out check . One of my aunts asked to pay separate for js her and her kids and spouse. When the server came back with the check she only came w two , we were co fused cs we never said we were all going to pay tg . The server told my mom to write down who’s meal was in each check HERSELF and told us that there were only allowed two checks for in total per party the bartender told my mom that’s how things are done in Chicago (because we are here from kcmo) honestly the whole thing was stressful and unnecessary we won’t be coming back because of the lack of decent of asking if there was going to be more than one check or at least telling us in the beginning before even getting our order that only two checks were allowed
Lucio is the best! We recommend the Monday Specials! They also do 3 hour unlimited house margs on Sundays 11-1:30!! The staff is always friendly and accommodating. Come give this spot a try!

Food is awesome. Huge fan the green enchiladas here. The salsa is also great.

Lucio has been our server multiple times and is wonderful.
Love this place. Margaritas Mondays are a great deal and the Spivey margaritas are phenomenal. If you’re hungry their enchiladas suizas with ground beef would be my recommendation!
Love the quesabirrias and the margaritas. Super cool vibe
Amazing experience. Place is so clean and food was delicious

Ok it’s been such a long time since I’ve had this quality of service as well as food as well as atmosphere!! Our food was not only fantastic but it came out hot fresh and most importantly melted in my mouth! The sampler platter is enough for you and a date! But after tasting the food I ordered a steak burrito that came out so hot and fresh and great tasting I’m ranting and raving now! Our server Kevin was not only attentive and friendly and just great he needs a raise!! Make home a manager because he is great and provides such a great environment! I will not only be back soon but I’m a regular now!!
Absolutely love this place and the food.
Great time. Mariachi band on Tuesday.  Plenty of dining options.  Also has drink specials most days. Not a huge place

The food is good but it’s definitely not worth how expensive it is. Charging $30 for burritos, $60 for steaks and $20 for margaritas is ridiculous. And the service is also quite poor. Have to explain my order numerous times

Every time we arrive at this lovely place, everything is truly spectacular: the service, the bartender, the food, and their fantastic rice pudding. It's a truly better experience each time. Highly recommended.

I’ve been to Casa Tequila a few times, and I always have a great time. I usually order the quesabirra, which is my fav! This time, I ordered the chimichanga, which was just ok. My friend ordered a burrito, and he LOVED it! Overall, this is a great restaurant that I love to visit. It’s always clean with fast, reliable service. My server Jamie was exceptional this visit. He was very personable, continuously checked on us, and gave excellent drink recommendations. Looking forward to coming back!
Jaime was great and caring for us the whole night. He made our night memorable. Will be back for another great experience 🥰🥰
Jamie did amazing job great waiter!!!
Jaime was an excellent servant took good care of us with good food!

First time coming here, Jaime’s service was very well. Very friendly and attentive.
Definitely coming here again.
Great experience, Jaime was a great server and made our night. Will definitely be back!
The food and the service was excellent. Carlos was very attentive and very personable with us and other customers. We love this place.
Jamie was 10/10 service and showed great care for our table and my girls birthday!
Jamie was great!!!! 10/10
Food was really great they got a good patio and great atmosphere inside

I highly recommend Casa Tequila. My family and I went looking for a Mexico World Cup game, but we had a truly excellent experience. Everything we ordered was delicious. My husband ordered the carne asada, my daughter the birria tacos, my son the sirloin, and I had a shrimp cocktail, and everything was absolutely delicious. The service was excellent, and Mario, our waiter, was incredibly friendly and efficient. I live in San Diego, but I will definitely return to Casa Tequila when I go back to Chicago.
Very rich, everything highly recommended.
Everything was delicious, the place was excellent, the atmosphere luxurious, perfect for any occasion, and Mario's service was outstanding.
